List Derivative Files from OpenNeuroDerivatives S3 Bucket

Source: R/discovery-spaces.R
dot-list_derivative_files_s3.Rd

Lists files from the OpenNeuroDerivatives S3 bucket using the AWS CLI. This function handles the s3://openneuro-derivatives/ bucket structure.

Usage

.list_derivative_files_s3(dataset_id, pipeline)

Arguments

dataset_id

Character string: Dataset identifier (e.g., "ds000102").

pipeline

Character string: Pipeline name (e.g., "fmriprep").

Value

Character vector: Filenames found in the S3 bucket. Returns empty vector with warning if access is denied or AWS CLI is not available.

Details

The OpenNeuroDerivatives S3 bucket uses the structure: s3://openneuro-derivatives/{pipeline}/{dataset_id}-{pipeline}/

This function uses --no-sign-request for anonymous access and limits results to 500 items for efficiency.

On this page
